title: Infrastructure for
description: Downcity gives builders the reusable runtime layer that agent products keep rebuilding.

agent.title: Agent-first Runtime
agent.description: Run agents as managed daemons with session context, tool access, and reachable surfaces through CLI, SDK, or Console.

knowledge.title: Memory & Context
knowledge.description: Sessions, logs, runtime state, and task artifacts keep agent behavior visible and continuous across interactions.

runtime.title: Reusable Layer
runtime.description: One runtime for models, tools, tasks, memory, services, and operations across many products and entry points.

tools.title: Tools & Plugins
tools.description: Add capabilities through plugins, skills, City APIs, and SDK extensions without forking the whole backend.

ownership.title: Governed Execution
ownership.description: Runtime boundaries, permissions, audit logs, and operator surfaces keep execution inspectable and recoverable.

surface.title: Multi-surface
surface.description: Embed agents into CLI workflows, browser apps, desktop consoles, or third-party platforms with the same backend.

research.title: Research Assistant
research.description: Let agents collect sources, summarize findings, and maintain a living knowledge base across sessions.

report.title: Report Generation
report.description: Turn structured data and long-form notes into consistent drafts with traceable source references.

learning.title: Learning Companion
learning.description: Answer questions, explain code, and guide users through complex documentation without losing thread.

knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.description: Index repo docs, notes, and API references so agents answer from your actual content instead of generic training data.

publishing.title: Publishing Workflow
publishing.description: Draft, review, and publish content through agent-assisted pipelines with human approval at every checkpoint.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Layer
knowledge.description: Documents, embeddings, and structured context live close to the agent so answers are grounded and auditable.

agent.title: Agent Layer
agent.description: Models, system prompts, sessions, and memory form a reusable brain that can be attached to any surface.

action.title: Action Layer
action.description: Tools, plugins, tasks, and permissions turn model outputs into real, governed operations inside your workspace.

codePreview.agentMdDesc: Define personality & rules in plain English
